channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: In pictures: Aftermath of twin earthquakes in Venezuela
item.description: Communities in northern Venezuela struggle after deadly quakes as rescuers race against time to find survivors.

item.title: World reacts as devastating Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 32
item.description: Global leaders express solidarity with Venezuela as dual earthquakes kill at least 32 and leave widespread devastation.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: Iran warns against Hormuz crossings without authorisation
item.description: An oil tanker navigates the strait, reportedly hugging the western coast, despite threats from Revolutionary Guards.

item.title: Magnitude 6.9 earthquake strikes northern Japan
item.description: Magnitude 6.9 earthquake strikes northern Japan

item.title: Moments of panic as earthquakes strike Venezuela
item.description: Video captured the first moments of two earthquakes striking Venezuela, triggering panic as people fled for safety.

item.title: Mexico fans celebrate three World Cup group-stage wins in a row
item.description: Mexico fans celebrate three World Cup group-stage wins in a row

item.title: Iran war day 118: IRGC rejects new Hormuz route; Rubio to meet GCC leaders
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard warns against alternative route in Strait of Hormuz as top US diplomat to meet Gulf leaders.

item.title: South Africa fans hail historic World Cup knockout entry after Korea win
item.description: The nation’s shock win against South Korea quelled criticism back at home after doubts about coach Hugo Broos’ team.

item.title: South Africa celebrates reaching World Cup knockout stage for first time
item.description: South Africa’s team has celebrated reaching the World Cup knockout stage for the first time after defeating South Korea.

item.title: ICC judges sue Trump over sanctions, call measures unlawful
item.description: Judges argue sanctions aimed to punish and coerce ICC decisions on US and Israeli war crimes cases.

item.title: ‘We hugged each other and ran’: Venezuelans recount earthquake horror
item.description: Survivors describe panic and collapsing buildings during two strong quakes as thousands of people feared dead.

item.title: In New York’s Astoria neighbourhood, Arab nations unite in World Cup joy
item.description: Historic World Cup match wins for Egypt, Morocco and Algeria bring together fans from the Middle Eastern diaspora.

item.title: Rescuers pull survivors from rubble after Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: A major search-and-rescue effort is underway in Venezuela after two earthquakes levelled buildings and left many trapped

item.title: Kenya passes controversial bill two years after deadly Gen Z protests
item.description: Kenya passes controversial bill two years after deadly Gen Z protests

item.title: Ethiopia is not being ‘dragged into war’
item.description: A response to Redwan Hussein and Getachew Reda’s misleading opinion article.

item.title: Venezuela rocked by 7.5, 7.2 earthquakes: What happened and what we know
item.description: Rescue efforts under way as Venezuela declares a state of emergency after powerful twin quakes cause widespread damage.

item.title: In pictures: Venezuela hit by twin earthquakes
item.description: Caracas airport closed, metro suspended and power outages reported after deadly quakes rock Venezuela.

item.title: Three sisters with combined age of 316 discuss the secrets to life
item.description: Three Brazilians with a combined age of 316 have been recognised as the world’s longest-living trio of sisters.

item.title: Trump says UK’s likely next leader Andy Burnham is ‘extremely liberal’
item.description: Trump has made his first comment on the UK’s likely next leader describing Andy Burnham as ‘extremely liberal’.

item.title: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuel
item.description: Thousands feared dead as twin earthquakes cause devastation across Venezuela.

item.title: Mexico triumph 3-0 to eliminate Czechia and win all three World Cup matches
item.description: Mateo Chavez opened the scoring in the 55th minute, and Julian Quinones scored his second goal of the tournament in the 61st.

item.title: Iranians mark first Ashura since Khamenei’s killing in the US-Iran war
item.description: Thousands gathered in Tehran on the eve of Ashura, the first since the killing of Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei.

item.title: Migrants left to endure deadly Paris heat with little shelter or aid
item.description: Hundreds of migrants in Paris are left exposed as a heatwave sweeps Europe.

item.title: South Africa stun South Korea to reach World Cup knockouts for the first time
item.description: Bafana Bafana, playing in the tournament for the first time since they hosted it in 2010, have reached the round of 32.
